revision.text:
[[de:Allesverschlinger]] {{Infobox deity |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME = D36:G17-A2-r:M37-r:pr |NAME-ERKLÄRUNG = ''ˁm-r-ḏr''
''All-Devourer'' }} '''All-Devourer''' is the name of the border god of {{ill|Ancient Egypt|en|Ancient Egypt|qid=Q11768|lt=ancient Egyptian|1=Ancient Egypt}} in the {{ill|Amduat|en|Amduat|qid=Q460509|lt=Amduat|1=Amduat}}, which is present only during the {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|qid=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}}. He represented the passage gate from the {{ill|First Night Hour (Ancient Egypt)|de|Erste Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)|ja|第一夜時|lt=First Night Hour|lt_de=1.|lt_ja=1.|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Night Hour (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} into the {{ill|Second Night Hour (Ancient Egypt)|de|Zweite Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)|ja|第二夜時|lt=Second Night Hour|lt_de=2. Nachtstunde|lt_ja=2nd Night Hour|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Night Hour (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The {{ill|Solar deity|en|Solar deity|qid=Q511056|lt=Sun God|1=Solar deity}} {{ill|Ra|en|Ra|qid=Q1252904|lt=Ra|1=Ra}} sailed through the gate of the All-Devourer in his {{ill|Barque|de|Barke|ja|舟|lt=Solar Barque|lt_de=Sonnenbarke|lt_ja=太陽船|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Barque|1=boat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16767330}} to reach the {{ill|Wernes|de|Wernes|ja|ワーネス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wernes|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} region during the {{ill|Twilight|en|Twilight|qid=Q164160|lt=Evening Twilight|1=Twilight}}. {{Quote|They say the {{ill|Duat|en|Duat|qid=Q871389|lt=underworld|1=Duat}} gods, when this great god (Re) enters the (gate) "All-Devourer" after he has sailed the "Waters of Re" to the Wernes, “Oh, appear! Great {{ill|Ba (Egyptian mythology)|de|Ba (ägyptische Mythologie)|ja|バー (エジプト神話)|lt=Ba|lt_de=Ba|lt_ja=バー|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ba (Egyptian mythology)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}!”|Lower Register, Second Night Hour in the Amduat{{Webarchiv|url=http://www.amduat-achilles.de/neue_seite_2.html |wayback=20100415232251 |text=Amduat: Texte der 2. Nachtstunde|qq=}}.|qq=}} == See also == * {{ill|List of Egyptian deities|en|List of Egyptian deities|qid=Q1076616|lt=List of Egyptian Deities|1=List of Egyptian deities}} == Literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|qid=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz|1=Christian Leitz}} et al.: ''{{ill|Lexicon of Egyptian Deities and Deity Names|de|Lexikon der ägyptischen Götter und Götterbezeichnungen|ja|エジプト神と神名の辞典|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lexicon of Egyptian Deities and Deity Names|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' (LGG), Volume 2, Peeters, Leuven 2002, ISBN 9-0429-1147-6, p. 113. == References == {{translated page|de|Allesverschlinger|version=242309331|comment=Imported full de history}} [[de:Allesverschlinger]] [[ja:全喰者]] {{wikidata link|Q2648719}}
